svg.text: Neon Blaster X Proposed Enemy Fleet
28 legal proposal designs across Needle, Bulwark, Manta, and Fortress, with symmetry-first thruster placement and no Vulture archetype
Quotas across the full board: 3 low-yaw ships, 6 slow ships, and 9 highly mobile ships. This is a proposal render only.
